what_it_does: Module constitution (prescriptive folder-note) for ai_tics/ — the file-discovered AI-TIC registry. Defines an AI-tic as a catalogued generic-AI fingerprint, specifies the per-file declaration schema (a module-level AI_TIC dict over {id, markers, label, desc}), lists the seven seeded live tics, and states the rules: each tic is one self-registering file, reads only (never resolve), update this file when adding one.
observations: Frontmatter: type constitution, register prescriptive, module ai_tics, governs [P1, M4], status living
Defines the schema: id MUST equal file stem; markers a non-empty list of non-empty strings; label/desc optional; malformed entry fails loud at discovery
Lists 7 seeded tics: framework_imposition, versioning, false_finality, silent_fallback, agent_arch, closure_form, mvp — each tied to a NAMED Tim frustration
States the M4 fingerprint pass matches coined-vocab projection against this registry to produce ai-fingerprint marks with direction 'subtract'
Asserts the catalogue is directory-discovered (add-a-row = a FILE), explicitly NOT a python AI_TICS = {...} dict (cites PART 4.3)
Names the seam: discovered by runtime/ai_tics.py:AiTicRegistry, mirroring ProjectionRegistry/RoleRegistry/NodeRegistry; consumers all_markers() and as_records() are pure reads
Flags create_ai_tic authoring + the fingerprint mark-pass wiring as a SEPARATE coordinated seam, not built in this lane
tests/ai_tics_acceptance.py asserts each live tic is reflected here
standouts: The denoising inversion: generic+recurring = a tic to SUBTRACT; idiosyncratic+recurring = gold — denoising as surfacing in the opposite direction
AI-tics are seeded from Tim's own NAMED frustrations (no-versioning, verify-before-claiming, no-silent-failures, open-future-writing, no-MVP)
Explicit 'registry like anything else' mirroring of roles/skills/projections/node-types — add-a-file, no-code-edit discipline
conventions: Follows the vault folder-note constitution pattern (frontmatter + Is/Why/Guarantees/Seam/Never/Relates-to/Read-next sections)
Open-vocabulary typed relations (governs, relates-to) and alias-based links
Enforces the file-per-entry self-registering registry pattern shared across the repo
notes: The governing spec for the AI-tic fingerprint registry — a file-per-tic catalogue of generic-AI tells to subtract during cognition, seeded from Tim's named frustrations.
questions: Is the create_ai_tic authoring path and the M4 fingerprint mark-pass wiring actually built yet, or still the flagged unbuilt seam?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a (this file IS the prescriptive spec; it states intent rather than implements)
intention_signals: To make the AI-tic catalogue an extensible, directory-discovered registry mirroring every other registry in the repo, so the cognition fingerprint pass can subtract generic-AI tells while idiosyncratic recurrence is preserved as signal.
novelty: Framing recurring generic-AI writing patterns as a denoising-by-subtraction catalogue, with direction-aware marks and Tim's frustrations as seed data, is a distinctive cognition-engine concept.
contribution: Contributes the full prescriptive contract for the ai_tics registry: tic definition, schema, the seven seeded tics, the subtract-direction fingerprint semantics, and the read-only floor.
summary_for_embedding: Module constitution for the file-discovered ai_tics registry of generic-AI fingerprint tells, defining the AI_TIC declaration schema, seven seeded tics, and the M4 subtract-direction fingerprint pass.
intention_for_embedding: To govern an extensible add-a-file registry of generic-AI tells the cognition engine subtracts, seeded from Tim's named frustrations.
